ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Partner Referral Fee'), OR( ISBLANK( Opportunity__c ), ISBLANK(Referral_Fee_Amount__c ), NOT(Referral_Fee_Amount__c > 0), Impacts_Commission__c <> TRUE, Opportunity__r.AccountId <> Account_Name__r.Id ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 1)Opportunity & Referral Fee Amount are required 2)Impacts Commision should be checked 3)AccountName should be Account on Opportunity for Type Partner Referral Fee
